title: Diziler
subtitle: Indexed ve associative array islemleri.
code:
<?php

$numbers = [10, 25, 3, 47, 8];
echo "Dizi uzunlugu: " . count($numbers) . "\n";

sort($numbers);
echo "Siralanmis dizi: " . implode(", ", $numbers) . "\n";

// Eleman ekleme
$numbers[] = 100;
echo "\n100 eklendi: " . implode(", ", $numbers) . "\n";

// Eleman silme
$key = array_search(3, $numbers);
if ($key !== false) {
    unset($numbers[$key]);
}
echo "\n3 silindikten sonra: " . implode(", ", $numbers) . "\n";

// Associative array (dictionary benzeri)
$ages = [
    "Ali" => 25,
    "Veli" => 30,
    "Ayse" => 28,
];

echo "\nYas kayitlari:\n";
foreach ($ages as $name => $age) {
    echo $name . " -> " . $age . " yasinda\n";
}

// Anahtar kontrolu
if (array_key_exists("Ali", $ages)) {
    echo "\nAli'nin yasi: " . $ages["Ali"] . "\n";
}

// Toplam
$total = array_sum($numbers);
echo "\nToplam: " . $total . "\n";

?>
